'''mazomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:graduate|graduate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-z-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:graduate|graduate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| mazomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæzemeth|mæzemeth]] || [[word:mæzemej|mæzemej]] || [[word:mæzemesh|mæzemesh]] || [[word:mæzeme|mæzeme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mazozomoth|mazozomoth]] || [[word:mazozomoj|mazozomoj]] || [[word:mazozomosh|mazozomosh]] || [[word:mazozomo|mazozomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mazomoth|mazomoth]] || [[word:mazomoj|mazomoj]] || [[word:mazomosh|mazomosh]] || [[word:mazomo|mazomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mazofmoth|mazofmoth]] || [[word:mazofmoj|mazofmoj]] || [[word:mazofmosh|mazofmosh]] || [[word:mazofmof|mazofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mazomotho|mazomotho]] || [[word:mazomojo|mazomojo]] || [[word:mazomosho|mazomosho]] || [[word:mazomoko|mazomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mazomoth|mazomoth]] || [[word:mazomoj|mazomoj]] || [[word:mazomosh|mazomosh]] || [[word:mazomo|mazomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mazomothol|mazomothol]] || [[word:mazomojol|mazomojol]] || [[word:mazomoshol|mazomoshol]] || [[word:mazomokol|mazomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mazomothotho|mazomothotho]] || [[word:mazomojojo|mazomojojo]] || [[word:mazomoshosho|mazomoshosho]] || [[word:mazomoko|mazomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mazomothon|mazomothon]] || [[word:mazomojon|mazomojon]] || [[word:mazomoshon|mazomoshon]] || [[word:mazomokon|mazomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mazomothoro|mazomothoro]] || [[word:mazomojoro|mazomojoro]] || [[word:mazomoshoro|mazomoshoro]] || [[word:mazomokoro|mazomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
